Module com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java
Package com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal

Class SizeValidatorImpl

java.lang.Object
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal.extension.AbstractObjectValidator<S,T>
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal.extension.AbstractComparableValidator<S,T>
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal.extension.AbstractNumberValidator<SizeValidator,Integer>
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal.SizeValidatorImpl
All Implemented Interfaces:
ExtensibleComparableValidator<SizeValidator,Integer>, ExtensibleNumberValidator<SizeValidator,Integer>, ExtensibleObjectValidator<SizeValidator,Integer>, ExtensiblePrimitiveValidator<SizeValidator,Integer>, SizeValidator
public final class SizeValidatorImpl extends AbstractNumberValidator<SizeValidator,Integer> implements SizeValidator
Default implementation of a SizeValidator.

  • Constructor Details

    • SizeValidatorImpl

      public SizeValidatorImpl(ApplicationScope scope, Configuration config, String collectionName, Object collection, String sizeName, int size, Pluralizer pluralizer, List<ValidationFailure> failures, boolean fatalFailure)
      Parameters:
      scope - the application configuration
      config - the instance configuration
      collectionName - the name of the collection
      collection - the collection
      sizeName - the name of the collection's size
      size - the size of the collection
      pluralizer - returns the singular or plural form of the collection's element type
      failures - the list of validation failures
      fatalFailure - true if validation stopped as the result of a fatal failure
      Throws:
      AssertionError - if scope, config, name, collection, pluralizer or failures are null. If name or collectionName are blank.
